name: LINE meeting media intake reliability

dataIsolation.guard: Install the behavior independently in each target runtime. Never copy LINE IDs, group bindings, Notion records, media, transcripts, credentials, environment values, or deployment state between projects.

definitionOfDone: The group-binding Notion query contains the LINE group ID but no undeclared status select value
Routable statuses are accepted in application code and disabled bindings remain rejected
Duplicate bindings inside one tenant or across tenants fail closed
A native LINE video invokes the meeting-media handler exactly once
Accepted meeting media short-circuits downstream generic media handling
Existing audio and file meeting-intake regression checks pass
The target project manifest and project-local upgrade record are updated after installation
Production is marked Deployed only after target-specific verification
